scripts.prepare: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(fs.readdirSync('.').some(f=>f.endsWith('.node')))process.exit(0);try{require('child_process').execSync('node scripts/build-with-dts-guard.mjs build --platform --release',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.warn('[emerald-contracts-napi] native build skipped — index.d.ts preserved by dts-guard (non-fatal)')}process.exit(0)"
